posts.raw_content:
This is why I really don't give a fuck about the whole "Israel is top enemy number one!!!" bullshit and see it as a psyop more than anything else.

You don't have to like Israel. I don't care about Israel, I don't get paid by them to say this so don't come at me with that retarded shit. It's okay to criticize them and whatever influence it has in American politics. That's one thing. But it's another thing entirely to obsess over it and prioritize it over all other issues. Because if you do that, then you're basically just becoming a useful idiot for the left.

I think it can be genuinely stated that "Israel Derangement Syndrome" exists and it's the "dissident" right's version of TDS. These people are so vehemently opposed to Israel that they will literally give anti-American communists and muslims a pass if they hated Israel.

Massie was even getting endorsed by a lot of radical leftists. But I guess some idiots were willfully dismissive of that, ignored the blatant red flags in it, and were still tunnel-visioned about him not being funded by AIPAC. If that was all you care about then you might as well also praise people like Mamdani, who's also not funded by AIPAC.

Some retards even make the statement that the right and the left should "unite against Israel". Which, needless to say, that's entirely laughable, imagine uniting with people who had vile ghoulish celebrations over Charlie Kirk's assassination.

This obsession of making Israel a boogeyman for everything will make people inevitably start supporting leftwing policies. And thus, I won't join the "ITS DA JOOOS!" train, sorry not sorry.
